research_question: Do small-model optimizations transfer to a 397B MoE?

transfer_map.small_model_win: mmap/lazy weight load, trust OS page cache
transfer_map.moe_equivalent: Trust-OS page cache for expert streaming
single-stream decode w/ tool-calling JSON intact (4-bit)

note:
metal_infer/infer not built. Build it on your Mac:
  cd ../metal_infer && make
then re-run:  python large_model/validate_transfer.py
This harness will then benchmark the 4-bit baseline vs optimized MoE config and record tok/s + page-cache hit rate.
